steps.t: The Gaffer stands outside of his home on Bagshot Row. You should ask the Gaffer if you can show Bilbo's letter to Lobelia.
Lobelia Sackville-Baggins is up at Bag End, north of the Party Tree upon the Hill. You should bring Bilbo's parting letter to Lobelia, for it may give…
Lobelia Sackville-Baggins is up at Bag End, north of the Party Tree upon the Hill. You should talk to Lobelia about Bilbo's letter.
Lobelia is taking too long to read the letter. You should prod her for information.
